content: Hi, is it possible to submit multiple applications for different roles in different languages? For example tester in English but translator in Japanese
thread_title: Call for Community Volunteer Translators: Applications Open!

content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于8月6日 19:45 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯*50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年8月20日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
● 修复了拥有「蹈海者狂乱」卡牌击杀「腐潮之傀」后无法正常结束战斗的问题。
● 修复了命轮「伤痛之鳍」功能简介错误的问题。
● 修复了「幕间演习-唤醒体试玩」界面跳转至唤醒界面时显示异常的问题。
● 修复了「融灾禁区」排行榜中查看详情时未显示最大力量的问题。
● 修复了「通讯器」对话过程中可能会有短信文本超出底框的问题。
● 修复了英文调查问卷中链接无法跳转的问题。
    ○ 由于问卷无法跳转可能导致部分守密人无法填写问卷，问卷时间结束后48小时内，将为收到问卷但无法填写的守密人直接发放应有的问卷奖励。
● 优化了语言设置为英语时的以下文本表述问题：
    ○ 修复了造物故人的怀表、命轮隐世的转轮翻译描述不规范的问题。
        ■ 修复了每周挑战关卡超验存在翻译不统一的问题。
        ■ 优化了部分探索事件的选项翻译。
        ■ 优化部分敌人类型的附带描述翻译。
        ■ 修复了尤乌哈希“鳟鱼俱乐部”通讯器对话翻译错误的问题。
        ■ 修复了唤醒体珊意识潜游中珊角色名翻译错误的问题。类似剧情翻译将持续优化。

**V2.3.0.4 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on Agugust 6 at 19:45. You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
 
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
 
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on August 20, 2025 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailbox in time to claim the supply materials.
 
[Update Content]
● Fixed the issue where combat could not end normally after killing the Puppet of Putrescence with a card that has "Seafarer's Madness".
● Fixed an issue with the functional description of the Wheel of Destiny "Fin of Torment".
● Fixed an issue where the display became abnormal when transitioning from the "Intermission Drill - Awakener Trial" interface to the Awakener interface.
● Fixed an issue where the maximum Strength was not displayed when viewing details in the "D-Effect Zone" leaderboard.
● Fixed an issue where text messages might overflow the background frame during the "Signal Relay" dialogue.
● Fixed the issue where links in the English survey could not redirect.
   ○ Due to potential issues with questionnaire redirection, some Keepers may be unable to complete the survey. Within 48 hours after the survey period ends, survey rewards will be directly distributed to Keepers who received the questionnaire but were unable to complete it.

● Localization Fixes and Improvements (English Language Setting):
    ○ Optimized translations for the Relic "Deceased's Chrono" and the Wheel of Destiny "Wheel Unseen" for better clarity.
    ○ Fixed the incorrect translation of the weekly challenge stage "Arcane Dominion" (previously labeled as "Transcendent Existence" in certain places).
    ○ Improved translations for certain exploration event options.
    ○ Adjusted descriptions for specific enemy type tags for accuracy.
    ○ Corrected a translation error in Uvhash’s "Trout Club" communicator dialogue.
    ○ Fixed the mistranslation of "Petrified Sanga" during the Awakener Sanga's Psyche Deepdive.

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1385040039448412170/1400741933566918696
so, where's the new date thing. I still have to look up time zone conversion myself.
